# AiStaff — AI-Native Marketplace Platform
# https://aistaffglobal.com
# llms.txt v1 — updated 2026-03-15
# Format: https://llmstxt.org

> AiStaff is a triple-threat AI marketplace operating three verticals under one identity and escrow backbone:
> AI Talent (vetted engineers and prompt specialists), AI Agents (deployable digital workers), and AI Robotics (hardware-integrated AI solutions).

## Entity
- Name: AiStaff
- Domain: aistaffglobal.com
- Type: SoftwareApplication, Marketplace, B2B Platform
- Founded: 2025
- Stack: Rust microservices, Next.js 15, Wasmtime, Apache Kafka, PostgreSQL
- GitHub: https://github.com/breakdisk/AiStaff

## Marketplaces

### AI Talent Marketplace
Hire vetted AI engineers, prompt specialists, and ML practitioners.
Identity verified via Zero-Knowledge Proofs (Groth16/BN254). Trust score: GitHub 30% + LinkedIn 30% + ZK Biometric 40%.
Freelancers apply via structured proposals. Clients deploy via escrow-gated contracts.
URL: https://aistaffglobal.com/marketplace

### AI Agent Marketplace
Browse and deploy autonomous AI agents. Agents run inside Wasmtime sandboxes — no arbitrary code execution on host.
Categories: data sync, log auditing, HR automation, infrastructure scaling, secret rotation, contract review.
Deployment triggers a 30-second human-in-the-loop veto window before any escrow moves.
URL: https://aistaffglobal.com/marketplace

### AI Robotics Marketplace
Rent hardware-integrated AI solutions: robotic arm calibration, physical automation agents.
Same identity, escrow, and checklist pipeline as digital agents.
URL: https://aistaffglobal.com/marketplace

## Key Features

### Escrow & Payments
70/30 escrow split (developer 70% / talent 30%). Released only after:
(1) DoD checklist finalized, (2) identity tier ≥ 1, (3) 30-second veto window elapsed.
All transactions carry UUID v7 for idempotency. Double-spend is a bug, not an edge case.

### Identity & Trust
Three-tier identity: Unverified → SocialVerified → BiometricVerified.
Biometric data never stored — only Blake3(nonce ∥ proof) commitment.
ZKP circuit: Groth16 over BN254. Proof verified server-side only.

### Mechanic's Warranty
7-day fix-or-refund window on every deployment.
Artifact drift auto-detected via SHA-256 hash comparison.
Drift triggers VETO_WINDOW hold and creates warranty claim automatically.

### MCP Integration
Live marketplace data queryable via Model Context Protocol at localhost:4040 (internal).
Tool calls logged append-only to tool_call_audit table.

## Public Endpoints (REST)
- GET  /api/marketplace/listings           — All active agent/talent listings
- GET  /api/marketplace/listings/:id       — Single listing detail
- POST /api/marketplace/deployments        — Deploy an agent (authenticated)
- GET  /api/marketplace/skill-tags         — All available skill categories
- POST /api/marketplace/express-interest   — Freelancer applies to a job

## Pages (public, crawlable)
- /                    — Homepage
- /marketplace         — All listings (SSR)
- /leaderboard         — Talent reputation leaderboard
- /pricing-tool        — Pricing reference
- /pricing-calculator  — ROI / cost estimation tool
- /proof-of-human      — Human verification report and methodology
- /transparency        — Platform trust and audit transparency page
- /legal-toolkit       — Contract and compliance reference
- /login               — OAuth login (GitHub, Google, LinkedIn)

## Optional
- llms-full.txt: https://aistaffglobal.com/llms-full.txt
- sitemap: https://aistaffglobal.com/sitemap.xml
- robots: https://aistaffglobal.com/robots.txt
